pi_items.source: Data analysis: Chinook has 24 countries, Northwind has 21 countries. Exact match yields 17 overlapping countries: Argentina, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Spain, Sweden, USA. With UK/United Kingdom normalization, 18 countries overlap including UK.
Data analysis confirms maximum overlap is 18 countries (with UK/United Kingdom normalization), not 22

pi_items.verified_value: Yes - Chinook uses 'United Kingdom' while Northwind uses 'UK'. Task description explicitly states: 'Note: Northwind uses 'UK' and Chinook uses 'United Kingdom'. You must normalize these to ensure they match as an overlapping market.'
pi_items.source: Data comparison and task description requirement
Revenue calculation from Chinook Invoice.Total and Northwind OrderDetail calculations

privileged_info_summary: The task uses two real, publicly available sample databases: Chinook (a digital media store database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) and Northwind (a small business ERP database from https://github.com/jpwhite3/northwind-SQLite3). The Chinook database contains 59 customers across 24 countries with invoice data. The Northwind database contains 830 orders across 21 countries with order detail data. The actual geographic market overlap is 17 countries with exact name matching (Argentina, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Spain, Sweden, USA), or 18 countries when normalizing Chinook's 'United Kingdom' to Northwind's 'UK' format. The top revenue country in both databases is USA. The task requires proper handling of the UK/United Kingdom naming discrepancy for correct data integration.
